halo_of_starry_radiance.notes: 2-set Healing Bonus is metadata only for DPS. 5-set party ATK buff uses current Off-Tune Buildup Rate. Base value is 1.0; Syntony Field can raise it by +0.5, and C2 can add +0.2 if enabled.

trailblazing_star.notes: 2-set Fusion DMG is already manually reflected in this build profile. 5-set is implemented as a runtime buff triggered by emitted fusion_burst or tune_rupture_shifting mechanic events.

pact_of_neonlight_leap.notes: 2pc Spectro +10% and user-entered damage bonuses are profile-reflected. 5pc incoming ATK buff is runtime.

mornye.notes: Weapon base/static stats and Starfield Calibrator DEF% passive are assumed already reflected in user-entered real stat profile. Runtime effects are applied separately.

aemeath.notes: Weapon base ATK and crit stat are assumed already reflected in user-entered real stat profile. Runtime weapon passive effects are applied separately.

lynae.notes: Static Mist base ATK, crit rate, and ER are already reflected in profile; only Outro incoming ATK buff is runtime.

weapon.notes: Weapon base/static stats and Starfield Calibrator DEF% passive are assumed already reflected in user-entered real stat profile. Runtime effects are applied separately.

support_stats.off_tune_buildup_rate_note: Default Off-Tune Buildup Rate is 100% = 1.0. Mornye Syntony Field can add +50%; C2 can add another +20% when enabled.

weapon.notes: Weapon base ATK and crit stat are assumed already reflected in user-entered real stat profile. Runtime weapon passive effects are applied separately.

weapon.notes: Static Mist base ATK, crit rate, and ER are already reflected in profile; only Outro incoming ATK buff is runtime.

training_methodology_summary.curriculum_training_only_note: curriculum reset is training-only; it does not modify damage formulas, cooldowns, action masks, final evaluation reward, or default evaluation reset. Final fair evaluation should use curriculum_reset_mode = none unless explicitly studying curriculum starts.
training_methodology_summary.stale_model_warning: old PPO models before Lynae fixes are stale; old PPO models before Lynae transition, reward exposure, observation, and source-ref fixes should not be compared with new results.

model_training_metadata.old_model_invalidation_note: Retrain or continue-training from a compatible checkpoint after transition/observation/source fixes; do not treat older local optima as current evidence.
model_training_metadata.note: Maskable PPO models are party-specific because action space and observation shape can change.

valid_action_exposure_note: Transition actions are not policy actions. PPO selects policy-visible actions such as swap_to_lynae; full-Concerto transition execution is visible in resolved_action_counts.
aemeath_seraphic_duet_followup_source_mu: Source multiplier remains 1.0935 when present; 1.531 / 1.5309 is not hardcoded as the coefficient.
aemeath_forte_interfered_amp_note: Interfered Marker is reported as damage-taken amp and is not part of the 1.0935 source multiplier.
legacy_damage_by_source_action_category_: Backward-compatible source action category totals include generated mechanic damage attached to the source action.
